context: Agent must produce a library-mode vite.config.ts with correct externalization, DTS plugin, and workspace-relative paths, following the nx-vite-integration skill library mode guidance.

checklist.name: nxViteTsPaths included in plugins
checklist.description: nxViteTsPaths() is present in the plugins array.

checklist.name: DTS plugin configured correctly
checklist.description: vite-plugin-dts is imported and configured with entryRoot, tsConfigFilePath, and skipDiagnostics.

checklist.name: build.lib configured with correct entry, name, and formats
checklist.description: build.lib.entry is 'src/index.ts', name is 'UiComponents', formats is ['es'].

checklist.name: @my-org scoped packages externalized
checklist.description: rollupOptions.external includes a regex or pattern matching /^@my-org\//.
